title: grammitis scabristipes
intro: Grammitis scabristipes, also known as the scaber-fronded button fern, is a species of fern in the family Grammitidaceae. It is native to tropical regions and has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Grammitis scabristipes include treating wounds, reducing fever, and alleviating respiratory issues such as bronchitis and coughs. Grammitis scabristipes can be prepared as a tea or infused in hot water to create a decoction, which is then used to treat various health conditions.
